# size

**Instance Property**

The dimensions of the page in this document.

## Declaration

```swift
var size: CGSize { get }
```

## Inspecting a page

- **AssignableDocument.Page.ID**: A type representing the stable identity of this page.
- **id**: The stable identity of this page.
- **AssignableDocument.Page.Document**: The document type this element is for.
